# Caleye
> Official public website pages for product information and policies.

## Canonical
- https://caleye.co/

## Pages
- [Home](https://caleye.co/): Product overview.
- [Features](https://caleye.co/features.html): Full feature list.
- [How It Works](https://caleye.co/how-it-works.html): Workflow and usage details.
- [Contact](https://caleye.co/contact.html): Contact information.
- [Privacy Policy](https://caleye.co/privacy.html): Privacy and data policy.
- [Terms](https://caleye.co/terms.html): Terms and conditions.

## Crawling
- Public content may be indexed.
- Sitemap: https://caleye.co/sitemap.xml
